title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables building reliable multi-agent systems with SequentialAgent and LoopAgent for task orchestration. The framework supports context caching, grounding with Google Search, and instant deployment to Google's Agent Engine via CLI.
